nasb.text: So the captains of hundreds did according to all that Jehoiada the priest commanded. And each one of them took his men who were to come in on the sabbath, with those who were to go out on the sabbath, and came to Jehoiada the priest.

esv.text: The captains did according to all that Jehoiada the priest commanded, and they each brought his men who were to go off duty on the Sabbath, with those who were to come on duty on the Sabbath, and came to Jehoiada the priest.

cnv.text: 於是眾百夫長照著耶何耶大祭司的一切吩咐去行。他們各自率領人馬，無論在安息日值班或不用當值的，都來到耶何耶大祭司那裡。

ccb.text: 众百夫长依令而行，各自率领安息日值班和休班的随从来见耶何耶大。
